title: Company Info
heroTitle: Giving people the power to build community.
heroSub: CulturePass is built to bring the world closer together, strengthening the social fabric of multicultural cities through cultural participation.
mission: CulturePass is built to empower cultural diaspora communities by connecting people with the events, businesses, and organisations that celebrate their heritage. We believe culture is best experienced together.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.body: To give people the power to build community and bring the world closer together through the universal language of culture.

sections.title: What we do
sections.body: We build technology that helps people discover, connect and belong in their local cultural communities. From festivals to grassroots organisations, we make cultural life discoverable for everyone.

sections.title: Who we serve
sections.body: We serve multicultural cities and diaspora communities worldwide, providing a home for culture and connection in an increasingly disconnected world.

values.title: Belonging
values.desc: Culture creates identity and a sense of home wherever you are.

values.title: Inclusion
values.desc: Everyone deserves to see their heritage reflected and celebrated.

values.title: Preservation
values.desc: We protect and amplify traditions, languages, and stories for future generations.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: Technology that serves real human connection, not replaces it.

contact.address: Tech Central Level 1/477 Pitt St, Haymarket NSW 2000
